data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of time-boxed seat holds while checkout is in progress. However, the evidence does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm the implementation of this feature. The linked use case describes the expected behavior, but there is no evidence demonstrating that the system correctly holds seats for the specified duration during the checkout process, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of time-boxed seat holds during checkout.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for seat hold functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that seats are held for the specified duration during checkout.
